name: team
summary: a survey team member. The first argument is his/her name, the others describe the roles of the person in the team (optional - currently not used). The following role keywords are supported: [back]tape ([back]length), [back]compass ([back]bearing), [back]clino ([back]gradient), counter (count), depth, station, position, notes (notebook), pictures (pics), instruments (insts), assistant (dog), altitude (dz), dimensions, left, right, up (ceiling), down (floor).
